Name: Theme-Default
RawString:
<style>	
	/* Variables. */
	:root {
		--bs-body-font-size: 12px;
		--bs-nav-link-font-size: 14px;
		--bs-breakpoint-xs: 0;
		--bs-breakpoint-sm: 720px;
		--bs-breakpoint-md: 1080px;
		--bs-breakpoint-lg: 1440px;
		--bs-breakpoint-xl: 1920px;
		--bs-breakpoint-xxl: 2160px;

		--header-height: 121px;
		--footer-height: 38px;

		--bs-body-font-size: [theme[font.size]];
		--kendo-font-size: [theme[font.size]];
		--bs-body-font-family: [theme[font.family]];
		--kendo-font-family: [theme[font.family]];
	}

	.tab-control { height: calc(100% - 5px); border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; } 
	.tab-control > nav > .nav-tabs > button { margin-left: 10px; }
	.tab-content { height: calc(100% - 40px); border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; }
	.tab-content > .tab-pane > .component { height: 100%; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; }
	.tab-content .editor { height: calc(100% - 5px - [theme[margins]]) !important; }

	.k-toolbar ~ .tab-control, .k-toolbar ~ .k-grid {
		height: calc(100% - 56px); // 51px height for kendo toolbar + 5px margin top on nav.
		border-radius: [theme[border.radius]];
	}

	.k-tabstrip {
		height: 100%;
	}

	.dropdown-menu {
		--bs-dropdown-link-active-color: [theme[colours.secondary]]; 
		--bs-dropdown-link-active-bg: transparent; 
		--bs-dropdown-link-hover-color: [theme[colours.secondary]];
		--bs-dropdown-link-hover-bg: transparent;
	}

	.nav-link {
		--bs-nav-link-color: [theme[colours.primary]];
	}

	.nav-link:focus, .nav-link:hover {
		--bs-nav-link-hover-color: [theme[colours.secondary]];
		border-bottom: [theme[border.style]];
	}

	.nav-link.active {
		--bs-nav-tabs-link-active-color: [theme[colours.secondary]];
		border-bottom: [theme[border.style]];
	}

	.btn-primary {
		--bs-btn-color: [theme[colours.text2]];
		--bs-btn-bg: [theme[colours.primary]];
		--bs-btn-border-color: [theme[colours.primary]];
		--bs-btn-hover-color: [theme[colours.text2]];
		--bs-btn-hover-bg: [theme[colours.secondary]];
		border: [theme[border.style]];
		--bs-btn-hover-border-color: [theme[colours.primary]];
		--bs-btn-focus-shadow-rgb: 49,132,253;
		--bs-btn-active-color: [theme[colours.text2]];
		--bs-btn-active-bg: [theme[colours.secondary]];
		--bs-btn-active-border-color: [theme[colours.primary]];
		--bs-btn-active-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		--bs-btn-disabled-color: [theme[colours.text2]];
		--bs-btn-disabled-bg: [theme[colours.primary]];
		--bs-btn-disabled-border-color: [theme[colours.primary]];
	}

	.btn-primary > span.k-icon {
		color: [theme[colours.secondary]];
	}

	.btn-primary:hover > span.k-icon {
		color: [theme[colours.primary]];
	}

	.btn-secondary {
		--bs-btn-color: [theme[colours.text2]];
		--bs-btn-bg: [theme[colours.secondary]];
		--bs-btn-border-color: [theme[colours.secondary]];
		--bs-btn-hover-color: [theme[colours.text2]];
		--bs-btn-hover-bg: [theme[colours.primary]];
		border: [theme[border.style]];
		--bs-btn-hover-border-color: [theme[colours.secondary]];
		--bs-btn-focus-shadow-rgb: 49,132,253;
		--bs-btn-active-color: [theme[colours.text2]];
		--bs-btn-active-bg: [theme[colours.primary]];
		--bs-btn-active-border-color: [theme[colours.secondary]];
		--bs-btn-active-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		--bs-btn-disabled-color: [theme[colours.text2]];
		--bs-btn-disabled-bg: [theme[colours.secondary]];
		--bs-btn-disabled-border-color: [theme[colours.secondary]];
	}

	.btn-secondary > span.k-icon {
		color: [theme[colours.primary]];
	}

	.btn-secondary:hover > span.k-icon {
		color: [theme[colours.secondary]];
	}

	/* Layout */
	.header-logo { max-height: 100px; padding: 5px 10px; }

	.content-body {
		height: calc(100vh - var(--header-height) - var(--footer-height));
		margin-top: var(--header-height);
		margin-bottom: var(--footer-height);
		overflow: auto;
		width: calc(100% - 2px);
	}

	.content-body div.row 		{ --bs-gutter-x: 0; --bs-gutter-y: [theme[margins]]; margin-top: 0; max-height: 100%; }
	.content-body div.row > * 	{ --bs-gutter-y: 0; }

	.pageFooter 		{ background: [theme[colours.primary]]; color: white; }
	.pageFooter > div 	{ padding: 10px; }

	h2 {
		padding: 10px 25px;
		color: [theme[colours.primary]];
		font-size: 180%;
	}

	.border-bottom-separator {
		border-bottom: solid 4px [theme[colours.primary]];
	}

	h3 {
		padding: 10px;
		border-bottom: solid 2px [theme[colours.secondary]];
		color: [theme[colours.secondary]];
		width: 80%;
		font-size: 120%;
		margin-bottom: 0;
	}

	h3.red {
		color: red;
		border-bottom: solid 2px red;
	}

	h4 {
		padding: 8px;
		border-bottom: solid 2px [theme[colours.secondary]];
		color: [theme[colours.secondary]];
		font-size: 110%;
		width: 80%;
		margin-bottom: 0;
	}

	marquee { 
		font-weight: bold; 
		color: [theme[colours.primary]]; 
		font-size: 180%; 
		box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		border-width: [theme[border.width]];
		border-radius: [theme[border.radius]];
		border: [theme[border.style]];
		margin: [theme[margins]];
		padding: 15px;

		background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
		backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
		-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
	}

	/* Platform configuration */
	.component[name=TopNav] { display: inline-block; }

	.component {
		box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		border-width: [theme[border.width]];
		border-radius: [theme[border.radius]];
		border: [theme[border.style]];
		
		margin: [theme[margins]];
		height: calc(100% - [theme[margins]] - [theme[margins]]);

		background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
		//backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
		-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
	}

	.hidden > .component {
		box-shadow: none;
		-moz-box-shadow: none;
		-webkit-box-shadow: none;
		border-width: 0;
		border-radius: 0;
		border: none;
		margin: 0;
		height: 0;
		background: none;
		-webkit-backdrop-filter: none;
	}

	.component > h3 { border-radius: [theme[border.radius]] [theme[border.radius]] 0 0; }
	.component > h4 { border-radius: [theme[border.radius]] [theme[border.radius]] 0 0; }
	.component > .k-grid { margin: 0; max-height: 100%; }

	/* .component .chart, .component .k-chart {
		height: 350px;
		padding-bottom: 5px;
	} */

	.component.details > .col { flex: 1; vertical-align: top; width: calc(50% - [theme[margins]]); display: inline-block; }

	.component.details > .col > .details {
		box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		border-width: [theme[border.width]];
		border-radius: [theme[border.radius]];
		border: [theme[border.style]]; 
		margin: [theme[margins]]; 
	}

	.component.details > .col.right { margin-left: -[theme[margins]]; }

	.component > p {
		padding: 10px;
	}

	.k-detail-cell>.k-tabstrip {
		max-height: 750px;
	}

	.k-detail-cell .component {
		background: transparent;
	}

	/*Mail Management Email Preview */

	.mail-content-frame {
		width: 100%;
		height: 600px;
	}

	/* Bootstrap overrides. */
	.navbar > .container { max-width: 100%; padding: 0px; }
	.navbar { padding: 0px; }
	.navbar .dropdown-item, .navbar .nav-item { min-width: 150px; }
	.navbar .dropdown-item a { width: 80%; }
	.navbar .dropdown-item a.nav-link.active { border-bottom: solid 2px [theme[colours.primary]]; }

	.dropdown-item:hover > .dropdown-menu { 
		display: block; 		
		box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		border-width: [theme[border.width]];
		border-radius: [theme[border.radius]];
		border: [theme[border.style]]; 
	}

	.navbar .dropdown-item.active { border-bottom: solid 2px [theme[colours.primary]]; }
	
	.container-xxl {
		max-height: 100%;
		padding-top: 1px; /* NEVER REMOVE THIS OR YOU'RE FIRED! */
	}

	.component[name=TopNav] { border: none; box-shadow: none; }

	/* Bootstrap Cards */
	h3.card-title {color: [theme[colours.secondary]]; margin-bottom: unset;}
	.card-body{padding-top: 0px; padding-left: 0px; }
	.card-text{padding-left: 10px; padding-top: 10px;}

	/* Login */
	.component[name=Login] { 
		box-shadow: none; 
		-moz-box-shadow: none; 
		-webkit-box-shadow: none; 
		border: none;
	}

	.component[name=Login] .row { margin-bottom: calc([theme[margins]] + 20px); }

	.component[name=Login] .col { margin: [theme[margins]]; }
	
	.component[name=Login] img {
		box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		border-width: [theme[border.width]];
		border-radius: [theme[border.radius]];
		border: [theme[border.style]]; 
		margin: [theme[margins]]; 
	}

	.component[name=Login] form {
		box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		border-width: [theme[border.width]];
		border-radius: [theme[border.radius]];
		border: [theme[border.style]]; 
		margin: [theme[margins]]; 
		padding: 20px;
		padding-bottom: 0;
	}

	/* Detailed Nav */
	.component[name=DetailedNav] > ul.menu > li { 		
		box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		border-width: [theme[border.width]];
		border-radius: [theme[border.radius]];
		border: [theme[border.style]]; 
		margin: [theme[margins]]; 
		padding: 10px;
		height: 130px;
	}

	/* next cutoff details */
	.component[name=NextCutoffDetails] .nextCutOff { padding: 20px; font-weight: bold; font-size: 150%; }
	.component[name=NextCutoffDetails] .offerStats { padding: 5px; } 
	.component[name=NextCutoffDetails] .offerStats li { list-style-type: none; padding: 5px; }
	.component[name=NextCutoffDetails] .offerStats li span { margin-right: 10px; }
	
	[name=editorContainer] {
		min-height: 500px;
	}

	.component[name=Slideshow] {
		max-height: 210px;
	} 

	section[name=DMS] > div[name=splitter] {
		height: 100%;
	}

	.component[name=InviteUsers] [name=companiesGridContainer] {
		@media(min-height: 750px) {
			height: 50vh;
		}
	}

	/* Context Menus */
	.contextMenu {  
		background: white; 
		box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		-webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];
		border-width: [theme[border.width]];
		border-radius: [theme[border.radius]];
		border: [theme[border.style]]; 
		z-index: 1000;
	}
	.contextMenu > ul { list-style-type: none; padding: 2px; margin: 0; }
	.contextMenu > ul > li { padding: 4px; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; }
	.contextMenu > ul > li > .k-icon { margin-top:-2px; margin-bottom: 2px; margin-right: 4px; }
	.contextMenu > ul > li:hover { background: [theme[colours.primary]]; color: white; }
	.contextMenu > ul > li:hover > .k-icon { color: [theme[colours.secondary]]; }

	/*Sprite Based Icon Attachements e.g. Those used in DMS*/
	.k-sprite { background-image: url("[app[root]]Api/DMS/Content/icons.png"); margin-top: 0; }
	.root { background-position: 0 0; }
	.folder { background-position: 0 -16px; }
	.pdf { background-position: 0 -32px; }
	.page { background-position: 0 -48px; }
	.image { background-position: 0 -64px; }
	.question { background-position: 0 -80px; }
	.add { background-position: 0 -96px; }
	.query { background-position: 0 -112px; }

	[name=splitter] > .panel.right > .component { 
		height: 100%; 
		border: none;		
		box-shadow: none;
		-moz-box-shadow: none;
		-webkit-box-shadow: none; 
	}

	div[name=CoreManagementExpanded] {
		height: 100%;
		min-height: 750px;
	}

	section[name=AppTheming] > .row {
		min-height: 350px;
	}

	::-webkit-scrollbar {
		width: 8px;
		height: 8px;
	}

	/* Track */
	::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
		/* background: [theme[colours.primary]]; */
	}

	/* Handle */
	::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
		background: [theme[colours.secondary]];
        border-radius: [theme[border.radius]];
	}

	/* Handle on hover */
	::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
		/* background: [theme[colours.secondary]]; */
	}

	/*Grid Page Selection Dropdown*/
	span.k-input-inner { display: unset !important; }
	.k-input-md .k-input-inner, .k-picker-md .k-input-inner {padding-inline: 0.5rem; }
	.k-pager-md .k-pager-sizes .k-dropdownlist, .k-pager-md .k-pager-sizes > select {width: auto;}


	.component[name=CMS] [name=workspace] > iframe {
		width: 100%;
		height: 100%;
	}

	.component[name=CMS] span[name=showOnMenu] {
		cursor: pointer;
	}
	
	.logLevelOptions > .option { display: inline; }

</style>

Name: Theme-Dark
RawString:
<style name="Theme-Default">

* { font-size: [model[font.size]]; font-family: [model[font.family]]; color: [model[colours.text]]; }

a           { color: [model[colours.links]]; cursor: pointer; }
hr          { border-top: [model[border.style]]; }

/* Headings */
h1 > a            { font-family: [model[font.family]]; color: [model[colours.primary]]; cursor: pointer; }
h2                  { font-family: [model[font.family]];color: [model[colours.text2]]; background-color: [model[colours.primary]]; border-top: [model[borders]]; background: [model[colours.primary]]; }
h2 *               { font-family: [model[font.family]]; color: [model[colours.text2]]; background-color: [model[colours.primary]];  }
h3                  { padding: 6px 12px;; font-size: 110%; font-family: [model[font.family]]; background: [model[colours.secondary]]; color: [model[colours.text2]]; }
h3 > span       { font-size: 110%; font-family: [model[font.family]]; color: [model[colours.text2]]; }
h4                  { padding: 5px 12px; font-size: 100%; font-family: [model[font.family]]; background: [model[colours.secondary]]; color: [model[colours.text2]]; }
h4 > span       { padding: 5px 12px; font-size: 100%; font-family: [model[font.family]]; color: [model[colours.text2]]; }

/* Forms related tags */
fieldset            { border: none; }
pre                 { border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; }
input               { border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; }
select              { background: white; border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; }
textarea          { background: white; border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; }
textarea:focus { 
    box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; 
    border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; 
}
select:hover, 
textarea:hover          { background-color: white; color: #000; }
button, .button { 
    background-color: [model[colours.secondary]]; color: [model[colours.text2]];
    box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; 
    border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; 
    padding: 1px 8px;
    line-height: 24px;
}
button:hover, .button:hover { background-color: [model[colours.primary]]; color: [model[colours.text2]]; }
button:active, .button:active {  box-shadow: none; -moz-box-shadow: none; -webkit-box-shadow: none;  }
button > span.k-icon, .button > span.k-icon { line-height: 22px; }

/* layout */
body { background-repeat: no-repeat;  background-position: bottom right; background-origin: content-box; background-size: 500px; }
body > header                          { }
body > header > .details           { min-width: 500px;  }
body > header > .details > img { max-height: 90px; margin-top: -10px; }
body > header > .details > ul    { width: 200px; float: right; }
body > header > .details > ul > li { padding:3px; }
body > footer                            { margin: 0; background: [model[colours.primary]]; border-top-width: [model[border.width]]; border-top: [model[border.style]]; box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [model[shadows]];  }
body > footer .component         {  background: [model[colours.primary]]; }
body > footer .component label { color: #FFFFFF; }
body > footer p 		                 { color: #FFFFFF; }
body > .content[name=body]    {  overflow: auto; }
   
marquee { font-family: [model[font.family]]; color: [model[colours.primary]]; padding: 10px; font-size: 180%; border-width: [model[border.width]]; border: [model[border.style]];  box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; }
   
/* kendo hacks */
span.k-icon                                       { margin-top: -2px; margin-right: 5px; }
input[type=text]:hover                       { background: white; }
input[type=text]:focus                       { border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; }
input[type=password]:hover              { background: white; }
input[type=password]:focus              { border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; }
input[type=email]:hover                    { background-color: white; }
input[type=email]:focus                    { border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; }
input[data-role=datepicker],
input[data-role=numerictextbox]       { border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; }
input[data-role=datepicker]:focus,
input[data-role=numerictextbox]:focus  { border: none; }

/* tabs  */
.k-tabstrip-wrapper, .k-widget.k-tabstrip  { height: 100%; max-width: calc(100% - (([model[border.width]] + [model[margins]])*2)); max-height: 99.5%; padding-left: calc(([model[border.width]] + [model[margins]])*2) }
.k-widget.k-tabstrip > .tab.k-content { height: 100%; max-width: 100%; max-height: 99.5%; padding: 0; margin: 0 -3px; }
[data-role=tabstrip] [role=tab].k-state-active,
[data-role=tabstrip] [role=tab].k-state-active > span { background: [model[colours.primary]]; color: [model[colours.text2]]; border-bottom: none; }

/* grids */
.k-grid { max-width: 100%; padding: 0; margin: 0; overflow: hidden; }
.k-grid a { color: [model[colours.links]]; cursor: pointer; }
.k-grid th.k-header > a.k-link { font-weight: bold; }
.k-grid td[role=gridcell] { padding: 3px 5px; color: [model[colours.text]]; }
.k-grid .k-detail-cell [data-role=tabstrip] .tab.k-state-active { margin-left: 0; border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; }
.k-header.k-grid-toolbar > button, .k-toolbar > button { margin: 3px; margin-left: 10px; }

.k-filter-menu >  .k-filter-menu-container > .k-action-buttons > .k-button { height: 30px; margin: 0; color: [model[colours.links]]; box-shadow: none; }
.k-filter-menu >  .k-filter-menu-container > .k-action-buttons > .k-button:hover { background: [model[colours.secondary]]; color: [model[colours.text2]];  box-shadow: none; }

.k-list .k-item.k-state-selected, .k-list-optionlabel.k-state-selected { background-color: [model[colours.secondary]]; }
.k-list .k-item.k-state-hover.k-state-selected, .k-list .k-item:hover.k-state-selected, .k-list-optionlabel.k-state-hover.k-state-selected, .k-list-optionlabel:hover.k-state-selected { background-color: [model[colours.primary]]; }

/* Notifications */
.notification                   { padding: 3px 10px; min-width: 200px; max-width: 400px; max-height: 200px; word-wrap: normal; word-break: keep-all; }
.notification > .k-icon     { margin-right: 10px; }
.notification > *             { display: inline-block; }

.k-widget.k-notification { border: none; background: transparent; box-shadow: none; }
.k-widget.k-notification > .notification { color: #222; margin-bottom: 10px; border-radius: 5px; }
.k-widget.k-notification.k-notification-success > .notification  { color: [model[notifications.success.text]]; background: [model[notifications.success.background]]; border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; border-bottom: solid 3px green; }
.k-widget.k-notification.k-notification-info    > .notification  { color: [model[notifications.info.text]]; background: [model[notifications.info.background]]; border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; border-bottom: solid 3px blue; }
.k-widget.k-notification.k-notification-warning > .notification  { color: [model[notifications.warning.text]]; background: [model[notifications.warning.background]]; border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; border-bottom: solid 3px yellow; }
.k-widget.k-notification.k-notification-error   > .notification  { color: [model[notifications.error.text]]; background: [model[notifications.error.background]]; border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; border-bottom: solid 3px red; }
.k-numeric-wrap { overflow: hidden; }

/* Component styles */
.content { margin: 0; padding: 0; max-height: 100%; }
.component           { 
    vertical-align: top; box-sizing: border-box; display:inline-block; overflow: hidden;
    margin: [model[margins]]; width: 100%; height: 100%; max-width: calc(100% - (([model[border.width]] + [model[margins]])*2)); max-height: calc(100% - (([model[border.width]] + [model[margins]])*2)); padding: 0; background: [model[colours.background]]; 
    border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]];  box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [model[shadows]];  
}  
.k-window .component          { border: none; box-shadow: none; }
.k-tabstrip > .tab > section.component { padding: 0; margin: 0; width: 100%; border: none; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: none; }
  
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu { border: none; box-shadow: none; background:  transparent; }
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li    {  background: [model[colours.background]]; border: [model[border.style]] [model[border.width]] [model[border.radius]]; margin: 10px; box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; }
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li:hover { border: [model[border.style]] [model[border.width]] [model[border.radius]]; box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [model[shadows]];}
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li a { background: [model[colours.primary]]; color: [model[colours.text2]]; } 
   
/* validation helpers */
input.error,
textarea.error          { background: white; border: dashed 1px [model[notifications.error.text]]; }
input.error:hover,
textarea.error:hover    { background: [model[notifications.error.background]]; }
label.error             { color: [model[notifications.error.text]]; }

/* sprite based icon attachements */
.k-sprite           { background-image: url("[api[root]]DMS/Content/icons.png"); margin-top: 0; }
.root               { background-position: 0 0; }
.folder             { background-position: 0 -16px; }
.pdf                { background-position: 0 -32px; }
.page               { background-position: 0 -48px; }
.image              { background-position: 0 -64px; }
.question           { background-position: 0 -80px; }
.add                { background-position: 0 -96px; }
.query              { background-position: 0 -112px; }
tr a			{ margin-right: 20px;}
   
/* forms */
.fieldList > li { padding: 2px; margin: 1px; }
.fieldList > li > .value > .k-invalid           { color: [model[colours.error]]; border: dashed 1px [model[colours.error]]; }
.fieldList > li > .value > .k-widget.k-tooltip.k-tooltip-validation       { margin: 5px 0; background: white; color: [model[colours.error]]; }
.fieldList > li > .value > .k-widget.k-tooltip.k-tooltip-validation.k-invalid-msg  { color: [model[colours.error]]; }

/* Menus */
body > header > nav 											      { border: none; box-shadow: none; background: transparent; margin: 0; margin-top: -33px; min-height: 33px; font-weight: bold;  }
body > header > nav .menu                                        { margin-left: 550px; }
body > header > nav .menu li                                     { border-radius: [model[border.radius]] [model[border.radius]] 0 0; background-color: [model[colours.secondary]]; color: [model[colours.text2]];  }
body > header > nav .menu li > a                         	   { background-color: [model[colours.secondary]]; color: [model[colours.text2]]; }
body > header > nav .menu li:hover,
body > header > nav .menu li:hover > a                     { background: [model[colours.primary]]; }
body > header > nav .menu li.selected                	     { background: [model[colours.primary]]; border-bottom: [model[border.style]] [model[border.width]] [model[border.radius]]; box-shadow:none;  }
body > header > nav .menu .sep                       		   { color: [model[colours.background]]; background: [model[colours.background]]; }
body > header > nav .menu li .submenu                     { box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; border-radius: 0 0 [model[border.radius]] [model[border.radius]]; overflow: hidden; }
body > header > nav .menu li:hover .submenu li       { background: [model[colours.secondary]]; border-radius: 0; }
body > header > nav .menu li:hover .submenu li:hover,
body > header > nav .menu li:hover .submenu li:hover > a { background: [model[colours.primary]]; }
   
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu { border: none; box-shadow: none; background:  transparent; }
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li    { font-weight: bold; background: [model[colours.background]]; border: [model[border.style]] [model[border.width]] [model[border.radius]]; margin: 10px; box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; }
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li.selected { color: [model[colours.secondary]]; }
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li:hover { border: [model[border.style]] [model[border.width]] [model[border.radius]]; box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; }
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li a { background: [model[colours.primary]]; color: [model[colours.text2]]; }

/* Tooltips */
.tooltip > .tooltiptext             { display: none; background-color: white; color: [model[colours.text]]; border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; }

/* FlexRow */
.row                            { display: inline-block; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; -webkit-flex-direction: row; flex-direction: row; overflow-x: hidden; }
.row *                          { box-sizing: border-box; }
.row>h2                         { width: 100%; }
.row.header                     { padding: 0; border-top: #e0e0e0 1px solid; }
.row>.col                       { align-content: flex-start; flex: 20%; }
.row>.col-sm                    { flex: 0 25%; min-width: 25%; max-width: 25%;}
.row>.col-half                  { flex: 0 50%; min-width: 50%; max-width: 50%; }
.row>.col-lg 					{ flex: 0 75%; min-width: 75%; max-width: 75%; }
.row>.col-full                  { flex: 1 100%; }
   
/* Dialogs */
.k-window					            { overflow: hidden; }
.k-window .k-window-content  { 
    padding: 0; 
    background: white;  border-width: [model[border.width]]; border-radius: [model[border.radius]]; border: [model[border.style]]; 
    box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [model[shadows]]; 
}
   
.k-window .k-window-titlebar { color: [model[colours.text2]]; background: [model[colours.secondary]]; }
.k-window .k-window-content.component   { margin: 0; border: none; -moz-box-shadow: none; -webkit-box-shadow: none; box-shadow: none; }
.k-window > .component h3               { display: none; }
.k-window > .k-window-titlebar.k-header { color: [model[colours.text2]], background: [model[colours.primary]]; border: none; }
.k-window > .k-window-titlebar.k-header > .k-window-title { font-size: 100%; color: [model[colours.text2]];  background-position: 0 -16px; height: 17px; }
.k-widget.k-window > .k-window-titlebar.k-header > .k-window-actions { margin: 4px; margin-right: 0; }
.k-widget.k-window > .k-window-titlebar.k-header { color: [model[colours.text2]]; }
.k-window-title { color:  [model[colours.text2]]; }
.dialog { overflow: hidden; }
.dialog > p { margin: 10px; }
.dialog > .value > button { float: right; margin: 10px; margin-left: 0; }

/* Charts */
 .chart { width: 629px; hieght: 370px; display: inline-block; background: transparent; }
   .k-chart,  .k-chart-area { background: transparent; }
</style>

Name: Theme-Default-Old
RawString:
<style name="Theme-Default">

* { font-size: [theme[font.size]]; font-family: [theme[font.family]]; }

a           { color: [theme[colours.links]]; cursor: pointer; }
hr          { border-top: [theme[border.style]]; }

html {
    overflow-y: auto !important;
}

/* Headings */
h1 > a            { font-family: [theme[font.family]]; color: [theme[colours.primary]]; cursor: pointer; }
h2                  { font-family: [theme[font.family]];color: [theme[colours.text2]]; background-color: [theme[colours.primary]]; border-top: [theme[borders]]; background: [theme[colours.primary]]; }
h2 *               { font-family: [theme[font.family]]; color: [theme[colours.text2]]; background-color: [theme[colours.primary]];  }
h3                  { padding: 6px 12px;; font-size: 110%; font-family: [theme[font.family]]; background: [theme[colours.secondary]]; color: [theme[colours.text2]]; }
h3 > span       { font-size: 110%; font-family: [theme[font.family]]; color: [theme[colours.text2]]; }
h4                  { padding: 5px 12px; font-size: 100%; font-family: [theme[font.family]]; background: [theme[colours.secondary]]; color: [theme[colours.text2]]; }
h4 > span       { padding: 5px 12px; font-size: 100%; font-family: [theme[font.family]]; color: [theme[colours.text2]]; }

/* Forms related tags */
fieldset            { border: none; }
pre                 { border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; }
input               { padding: 6px 12px; border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; }
select              { background: white; border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; }
textarea          { background: white; border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; }
textarea:focus { 
    box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; 
    border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; 
}
select:hover, 
textarea:hover          { background-color: white; color: #000; }
button { 
    background-color: [theme[colours.secondary]]; color: [theme[colours.text2]];
    box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; 
    border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; 
    padding: 2px 16px;
}
button:hover { background-color: [theme[colours.primary]]; color:white; cursor: pointer; }
button:hover > span { color: white}; 
button:active {  box-shadow: none; -moz-box-shadow: none; -webkit-box-shadow: none;  }

/* layout */
body { background-repeat: no-repeat;  background-position: bottom right; background-origin: content-box; background-size: 500px; }
body > header                          { }
body > header > .details           { min-width: 500px;  }
body > header > .details > img { max-height: 90px; margin-top: -10px; }
body > header > .details > ul    { width: 200px; float: right; }
body > header > .details > ul > li { padding:3px; }
body > footer                            { margin: 0; background: [theme[colours.primary]]; border-top-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-top: [theme[border.style]]; box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; position: fixed; bottom: 0; width: 100%; }
body > footer .component         {  background: [theme[colours.primary]]; }
body > footer .component label { color: #FFFFFF; }
body > footer p 		                 { color: #FFFFFF; }
body > .content[name=body]    {display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; align-content: flex-start; gap: 0; flex-direction: row;}	
body > .content[name=body] .small-container { display: flex; flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; padding: 0; margin: 0; margin-right: -10; margin-bottom: -10; }	
body > .content[name=body] .component > .chart { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }	
body > .content[name=body] .component.small {  height: 170px;  width: 275px; }	
body > .content[name=body] .small-container { height: 350px; width: 570px; display: flex; flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; padding: 0; margin: 0; margin-right: -10; margin-bottom: -10; }	
body > .content[name=body] .component.dashboardComponent { height: 350px; width: 560px; }	
body > .content[name=body] .component { height: 350px; width: 560px; }	
body > .content[name=body] .component.large {  display: flex; flex: 1; flex-direction: column; min-height: calc(100% - 36px - (([theme[border.width]] + [theme[margins]]) * 2)); max-height: calc(100% - 36px - (([theme[border.width]] + [theme[margins]]) * 2));width: calc(100% - (([theme[border.width]] + [theme[margins]]) * 2)); }
body > .content[name=body] .component.details {  display: flex ; flex: 1 ; flex-direction: row !important; min-height: calc(100% - 36px - (([theme[border.width]] + [theme[margins]]) * 2)) ; max-height: calc(100% - (([theme[border.width]] + [theme[margins]]) * 2)) ; min-width: calc(100% - (([theme[border.width]] + [theme[margins]]) * 2)) !important; overflow: auto; }
body > .content[name=body] .component  .component { display: flex; flex: 1; flex-direction: column; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
.clock { text-align: right; }
.companyLogo2 { height: 70px; margin-top: 2px; margin-right: 1vw; }
marquee { font-family: [theme[font.family]]; color: [theme[colours.primary]]; padding: 10px; font-size: 180%; border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border: [theme[border.style]];  box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; }
.header-details { justify-content: space-around; padding-right: 5px; }
.backgroundAnimation { background: url('[api[root]]DMS/content/background.gif'); background-size: 100%; background-repeat: no-repeat; position: fixed; bottom: -85px; right: 50px; height: 200px; width: 400px; z-index: -1;} 
/* kendo hacks */
span.k-icon                                       { margin-top: -2px; margin-right: 5px; }
input[type=text]:hover                       { background: white; }
input[type=text]:focus                       { border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; }
input[type=password]:hover              { background: white; }
input[type=password]:focus              { border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; }
input[type=email]:hover                    { background-color: white; }
input[type=email]:focus                    { border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; }
input[data-role=datepicker],
input[data-role=numerictextbox]       { border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; }
input[data-role=datepicker]:focus,
input[data-role=numerictextbox]:focus  { border: none; }
.k-toolbar > button {display: initial; }
.k-tooltip.k-tooltip-closable.k-chart-tooltip > .k-tooltip-content {color: white !important; }
.k-grid-header .k-grid-filter.k-active, .k-grid-header .k-header-column-menu.k-active, .k-grid-header .k-grid-header-menu.k-active, .k-grid-header .k-hierarchy-cell .k-icon.k-active, .k-grid-header .k-hierarchy-cell .k-svg-icon.k-active { background-color: #F8C785 !important; } 
.k-pager-sizes > .k-picker > .k-button-solid-base:hover { background-color: #EBEBEB !important; }
.k-pager-numbers >  .k-selected { font-weight: bold; }
.k-sorted > .k-cell-inner > .k-link > .k-column-title { color: white; }
.k-pager-numbers > .k-button-flat-primary { color: [theme[colours.primary]] !important; }
.k-pager-numbers >  .k-button-flat-primary:hover { font-weight: bold;  color: [theme[colours.primary]]}
.k-pager-nav:hover > .k-icon {color: [theme[colours.primary]]}
.k-pager-refresh:hover > .k-icon {color: [theme[colours.primary]]}

/* grids */
.k-grid { padding: 0; margin: 0;  max-height: 100%; }
.k-grid a { color: [theme[colours.links]]; cursor: pointer; }
.k-grid th.k-header > a.k-link { font-weight: bold; }
tr > th.k-table-th.k-header {padding: 5px 5px;}
.k-grid th.k-header.k-sorted { color:[theme[colours.text2]]; background-color: [theme[colours.secondary]] !important; }
.k-grid th.k-header.k-sorted > * { color:[theme[colours.text2]]; }
.k-grid td[role=gridcell] { padding: 3px 5px; color: [theme[colours.text]]; }
.k-header.k-grid-toolbar > button { margin: 3px; }
.k-grid.k-grid-display-block {display: flex !important;}
.content > .component > .k-grid > .k-grid-content.k-auto-scrollable, .k-grid-footer-wrap.k-auto-scrollable, .k-grid-header-wrap.k-auto-scrollable { display:flex !important; flex: 1 1 0; flex-direction:column; min-width: 0; }
.k-splitter {display: flex; flex: 1; flex-direction: column; }
:not(td) > .k-tabstrip-wrapper > .k-tabstrip > .k-content > .component > .k-grid > .k-grid-content { flex: 1 0 0 !important; } 
span.k-datepicker > button.k-input-button:hover {background-color: [theme[colours.primary]]; color: [theme[colours.text2]];}

.k-button-solid-primary, .k-button-solid-base  { background-color: [theme[colours.secondary]]; color: [theme[colours.text2]]; border: 0px; }
.k-button-solid-primary:hover, .k-button-solid-base:hover  { background-color: [theme[colours.primary]]; color: [theme[colours.text2]]; border: 0px; }
.k-button-text { color: white; }

.k-filter-menu >  .k-filter-menu-container > .k-action-buttons > .k-button { height: 40px; margin: 0; color: [theme[colours.links]]; }
.k-filter-menu >  .k-filter-menu-container > .k-action-buttons > .k-button:hover { background: [theme[colours.secondary]]; color: [theme[colours.text2]]; }

/*Fix weird width issue on grid filters*/
.k-filter-menu.k-popup .k-filter-menu-container, .k-grid-filter-popup.k-popup .k-filter-menu-container { width: unset; }
.k-filter-menu.k-popup {width: fit-content; }
.k-calendar-view {width: unset; inline-size: unset; }
k-calendar-view.k-calendar-monthview {width: fit-content !important;}
div.k-calendar-container > div[data-role=calendar] > div.k-header > a > span {color: [theme[colours.primary]]}
div.k-calendar > div.k-footer > button > span {color: [theme[colours.primary]]}

.k-list .k-item.k-state-selected, .k-list-optionlabel.k-state-selected { background-color: [theme[colours.secondary]]; }
.k-list .k-item.k-state-hover.k-state-selected, .k-list .k-item:hover.k-state-selected, .k-list-optionlabel.k-state-hover.k-state-selected, .k-list-optionlabel:hover.k-state-selected { background-color: [theme[colours.primary]]; }

/* Notifications */
.notification                   { padding: 3px 10px; min-width: 200px; max-width: 400px; max-height: 200px; word-wrap: normal; word-break: keep-all; }

.k-notification-success {color: [theme[notifications.success.text]]; background: [theme[notifications.success.background]]; border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; border-bottom: solid 3px green; }
.k-notification-warning { color: [theme[notifications.warning.text]]; background: [theme[notifications.warning.background]]; border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; border-bottom: solid 3px yellow;}
.k-notification-error { color: [theme[notifications.error.text]]; background: [theme[notifications.error.background]]; border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; border-bottom: solid 3px red; }
.k-notification-info {color: [theme[notifications.info.text]]; background: [theme[notifications.info.background]]; border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; border-bottom: solid 3px blue; }

.k-widget.k-notification { border: none; background: transparent; box-shadow: none; }
.k-widget.k-notification > .notification { color: #222; margin-bottom: 10px; border-radius: 5px; }
.k-numeric-wrap { overflow: hidden; }

/*Kendo Icons*/
.k-icon { width: auto !important; color: [theme[colours.primary]]}

/* Component styles */	
.content { margin: 0; padding: 0; max-height: 100%; display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap: 0; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: start; }	
.component { 	
    flex-shrink: 0; display:flex; flex-direction: column; max-height: 100%; max-width: 100%; 	
    margin: [theme[margins]]; padding: 0; background: [theme[colours.background]]; 	
    border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]];  box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];  	
}  	
.k-window .component { border: none; box-shadow: none; }	
.tab > .component { padding: 0; margin: 0px;  border: none; box-shadow: none; border-radius: 0px; display:flex; flex:auto;}

.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu { border: none; box-shadow: none; background:  transparent; }
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li    {  background: [theme[colours.background]]; border: [theme[border.style]] [theme[border.width]] [theme[border.radius]]; margin: 10px; box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; }
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li:hover { border: [theme[border.style]] [theme[border.width]] [theme[border.radius]]; box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]];}
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li a { background: [theme[colours.primary]]; color: [theme[colours.text2]]; } 
   
/* validation helpers */
input.error,
textarea.error          { background: white; border: dashed 1px [theme[notifications.error.text]]; }
input.error:hover,
textarea.error:hover    { background: [theme[notifications.error.background]]; }
label.error             { color: [theme[notifications.error.text]]; }

/* sprite based icon attachements */
.k-sprite           { background-image: url("[app[root]]Api/DMS/Content/icons.png"); margin-top: 0; }
.root               { background-position: 0 0; }
.folder             { background-position: 0 -16px; }
.pdf                { background-position: 0 -32px; }
.page               { background-position: 0 -48px; }
.image              { background-position: 0 -64px; }
.question           { background-position: 0 -80px; }
.add                { background-position: 0 -96px; }
.query              { background-position: 0 -112px; }
tr > td[role=gridcell] > a			{ margin-right: 20px;}
   
/* forms */
.fieldList > li { padding: 2px; }
.fieldList > li > .value > .k-invalid           { color: [theme[colours.error]]; border: dashed 1px [theme[colours.error]]; }
.fieldList > li > .value > .k-widget.k-tooltip.k-tooltip-validation       { margin: 5px 0; background: white; color: [theme[colours.error]]; }
.fieldList > li > .value > .k-widget.k-tooltip.k-tooltip-validation.k-invalid-msg  { color: [theme[colours.error]]; }

/* Menus */
.navbar-collapse { border: none; box-shadow: none; background: transparent; margin: -3px; min-height: 29px; font-weight: bold; clear: both; align-self: flex-end;}
.navbar-collapse .navbar-nav li { border-radius: [theme[border.radius]] [theme[border.radius]] 0 0; background-color: [theme[colours.secondary]]; color: [theme[colours.text2]]; white-space:nowrap; position: relative; display: inline; padding: 14px; margin-right: 1px; }
.navbar-collapse .navbar-nav li > a { color: [theme[colours.text2]]; }
.navbar-collapse .navbar-nav li:hover { background: [theme[colours.primary]]; }
.navbar-collapse .navbar-nav li:hover > a { background: [theme[colours.primary]]; }
.navbar-collapse .navbar-nav li.selected { background: [theme[colours.primary]]; border-bottom: [theme[border.style]] [theme[border.width]] [theme[border.radius]]; box-shadow:none;  }
.navbar-collapse .navbar-nav .sep { color: [theme[colours.background]]; background: [theme[colours.background]]; }
.navbar-collapse .navbar-nav li .submenu { box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; border-radius: 0 0 [theme[border.radius]] [theme[border.radius]]; overflow: hidden; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 40px; display: none;}
.navbar-collapse .navbar-nav li:hover .submenu li { background: [theme[colours.secondary]]; border-radius: 0; }
.navbar-collapse .navbar-nav li:hover .submenu li:hover, nav .menu li:hover .submenu li:hover > a { background: [theme[colours.primary]]; }

header .navbar-collapse .navbar-nav li:hover .submenu { display: block; }
header .navbar-collapse .navbar-nav li:hover .submenu li { min-width: 200px; display: block; }
   
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu { border: none; box-shadow: none; background:  transparent; }
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li    { font-weight: bold; background: [theme[colours.background]]; border: [theme[border.style]] [theme[border.width]] [theme[border.radius]]; margin: 10px; box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; }
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li.selected { color: [theme[colours.secondary]]; }
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li:hover { border: [theme[border.style]] [theme[border.width]] [theme[border.radius]]; box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; }
.component[name=DetailedNav] .menu > li a { background: [theme[colours.primary]]; color: [theme[colours.text2]]; }

/* Tooltips */
.tooltip > .tooltiptext             { display: none; background-color: white; color: [theme[colours.text]]; border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; }

/* FlexRow */
.row                            { display: inline-block; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; -webkit-flex-direction: row; flex-direction: row; overflow-x: hidden; }
.row *                          { box-sizing: border-box; }
.row>h2                         { width: 100%; }
.row.header                     { padding: 0; border-top: #e0e0e0 1px solid; }
.row>.col                       { align-content: flex-start; flex: 20%; }
.row>.col-sm                    { flex: 0 25%; min-width: 25%; max-width: 25%;}
.row>.col-half                  { flex: 0 50%; min-width: 50%; max-width: 50%; }
.row>.col-lg 					{ flex: 0 75%; min-width: 75%; max-width: 75%; }
.row>.col-full                  { flex: 1 100%; }
   
/* Dialogs */
.k-window					            { overflow: hidden; }
.k-window .k-window-content  { 
    display: flex; flex: 1; flex-direction: column;
    padding: 0; 
    background: white;  border-width: [theme[border.width]]; border-radius: [theme[border.radius]]; border: [theme[border.style]]; 
    box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -moz-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; -webkit-box-shadow: [theme[shadows]]; 
}
   
.k-window .k-window-titlebar { color: [theme[colours.text2]]; background: [theme[colours.secondary]]; }
.k-window .k-window-content.component   { margin: 0; border: none; -moz-box-shadow: none; -webkit-box-shadow: none; box-shadow: none; }
.k-window > .component h3               { display: none; }
.k-window > .k-window-titlebar.k-header { color: [theme[colours.text2]], background: [theme[colours.primary]]; border: none; }
.k-window > .k-window-titlebar.k-header > .k-window-title { font-size: 100%; color: [theme[colours.text2]];  background-position: 0 -16px; height: 17px; }
.k-widget.k-window > .k-window-titlebar.k-header > .k-window-actions { margin: 4px; margin-right: 0; }
.k-widget.k-window > .k-window-titlebar.k-header { color: [theme[colours.text2]]; }
.k-window-title { color:  [theme[colours.text2]]; }
.dialog { overflow: hidden; }
.dialog > p { margin: 8px; }
.dialog > .value > button { float: right; margin: 10px; margin-left: 0; }

/* Charts */
 .chart { max-width: 550px; max-height: 340px; background: transparent; }
   .k-chart,  .k-chart-area { background: transparent; }

/*Tabs*/	
    .k-tabstrip {flex: 1; width: 100%; }	
    .k-tabstrip-wrapper {display: flex; flex:auto; flex-direction: column;}	
    .tab { flex:auto; flex-direction: column;}	
    .tab .component { height: 100%; width: 100%; }
    .k-tabstrip>.k-content.k-state-active {display: flex !important;}
    .k-tabstrip>.k-content {padding:0px !important;}
    .k-tabstrip-items-wrapper .k-item { color: [theme[colours.primary]]}
    .k-tabstrip-items-wrapper .k-item.k-hover {color: [theme[colours.secondary]]}
    tab k-tabstrip-content k-content k-active { height: initial !important; min-height: initial !important; }
    [data-role=tabstrip] [role=tab].k-active,
    [data-role=tabstrip] [role=tab].k-active > span { background: [theme[colours.primary]]; color: white; border-bottom: none; }
    [data-role=tabstrip] [role=tab].k-active > span >span  {  color: white; }
    .tab { padding: 0px; }

    /*Checkboxes*/
    input[type="checkbox"] {min-width: 15px; min-height: 15px; }
    .k-checkbox:checked, .k-checkbox.k-checked { background-color: [theme[colours.secondary]]; border-color: [theme[colours.secondary]]; }
    .k-checkbox:checked:focus, .k-checkbox.k-checked { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(237, 137, 0, 0.5)}
    .k-check-all-wrap { padding-inline: 0px !important; }
    .k-multicheck-wrap > .k-item {padding-inline:0px !important;}
    .k-multicheck-wrap > li {padding-bottom: 4px; }
    .k-multicheck-wrap > li > input {margin-right: 4px; margin-left: 3px; }
    .k-grid td.k-selected, .k-grid .k-table-row.k-selected>td, .k-grid .k-table-td.k-selected, .k-grid .k-table-row.k-selected>.k-table-td {background-color: rgba(238,138,0,0.3); }
    
    /*Tree Views*/
    .k-treeview-leaf.k-selected {background-color: [theme[colours.primary]]; color: white; }
   .k-treeview-leaf.k-selected> .k-treeview-leaf-text { color: white; }

    /*Dropdowns*/
   .k-list-item.k-selected, .k-selected.k-list-optionlabel {background-color: [theme[colours.secondary]];}
    .k-list-item.k-selected:hover, .k-selected.k-list-optionlabel:hover {background-color: [theme[colours.secondary]];}
    .k-list-item.k-selected > .k-list-item-text {color: white !important; }
    .k-input-button:hover {background-color: #E9E9E9; }

    /*ThemeBuilder*/
    div.k-coloreditor-header.k-hstack > div> div > button:hover > span {color: [theme[colours.primary]]; background-color: #F2F2F2}
    div.k-coloreditor-views.k-vstack > div > div.k-colorgradient-inputs.k-hstack > div > button:hover > span {color: [theme[colours.primary]]; background-color: #F2F2F2 }
    .k-colorpicker > button:hover > span {color: [theme[colours.primary]] }
</style>

Name: Test
RawString:
User Activity Report for [model[fromYear]]-[model[fromMonth]]-01 to [model[toYear]]-[model[toMonth]]-01

Users

[execute] string result = string.Empty; foreach(var user in model.Data.Users) result += $""; return result; [/execute]
IdNameEmail
{user.Id}{user.DisplayName}{user.Email}

Sessions

[execute] string result = string.Empty; foreach(var session in model.Data.Sessions) result += $""; return result; [/execute]
DateNameEmailCountPage HitsApi Calls
{session.Date}{session.DisplayName}{session.Email}{session.SessionCount}{session.PageHits}{session.ApiCalls}
